subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath hearkened unto Thy call, who hath been drawn to Thy verses, and hath been set ablaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی سمع ندائک و انجذب من ایاتک و اشتعل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
